description_long: This is a luxurious, black leather Chesterfield-style armchair with a deep, tufted backrest and armrests, featuring classic diamond buttoning. The armrests are rolled and generously padded, matching the height of the backrest and adorned with metallic nailhead trim along the front. The seat is wide and cushioned, providing ample comfort, while the upholstery has a glossy finish that reflects light. The armchair sits on four short, rounded legs, barely visible beneath the base. The overall silhouette is bold and inviting, making it a statement piece suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A black, tufted leather Chesterfield armchair with rolled arms, glossy finish, and metallic nailhead trim, exuding luxury and comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep, tufted backrest, rolled armrests with nailhead trim, and wide cushioned seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest and the continuous tufted upholstery along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, padded back and the rounded silhouette of the armchair.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same padded armrest and tufted detailing.
attribute_armrest_design: rolled, padded, and upholstered in tufted leather with metallic nailhead trim
attribute_backrest_style: high, rounded, and deeply tufted with diamond buttoning
